description: Originally launched on Ethereum in 2023, AIcoin (AI) is now on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time. ATC-20 AI provides holders and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, AI contract capability, and seamless support for new AI projects that will or may bring significant everyday convenience to the public and small businesses worldwide.
name: AIcoin
